titleStmt.title: SII 38.129: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 129. (A.R. No. 129 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south base, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tiṅgaḷe tarutaṉ. It registers a sale of land by the sabhai of Kuṟaṭṭūr in Ambattūr-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam to the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple in order to conduct worship to the god Kārāṇai Viṭaṅkadēvar. It is also stated that this land was sold by the above sabhā at the command of Taṇḍēśvarar (Chaṇḍēśvarar), who was pleased to appear inside the temple, after the receipt of kāśu from the servants (dēvarkanmis) of the temple treasury. The sabha received the entire amount in full and agreed to exempt taxes, iṟai, echchōṟu, kuṟṟunel, veṭṭi and amañji. The madhyastha of the sabhā, Vīdiviṭaṅkan wrote this document. Tirubōgi kramavittam, Tiruvēṅkaṭa kramavittan and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷetarutaṉ ṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ purintuRead puṇarntuceṅkoloccik karuṅkalikaṭintu maṉṉu pallūḻiyuṭ ṭeṉṉavar mūvaril mānāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭi Āṉāṭ parumatiṭp pacun=talai porukaḷit tarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvitta ceruvil cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉaitticai keṭa tollaiyuḷ mullaiyurat turatti Olkalil veṇā
ṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻi rāmakuṭa muvarkeṭa muṉintu keḻukān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟuttāhamallan mañcaṟkevutanṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkava ceṉaiyilā kaṇṭappayyaṉum kaṅkātaranum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyit tiṇṭiṟal viritar vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum karumuraṭcāṅkamaiyyaṉu mutaliṉar vamar piruvot tuṭaitar nimir cuṭaṟ poṉṉoṭak kaṅkari puraviyo
ṭum piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷippākkaiy Oḷḷeri maṭuttu Oru taṉittaṇṭāṟ poru tiraiyuṭutta Ilaṅkaikkiṟaivaṉ Alaṅkal muṭi Arintu muṉṟaḷak kuṭaintu teṉṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatu miḻan teḻi kaṭaliḻam pukku Ilaṅkecanākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇi muṭicūṭi taṇṭi maṭu villavar miṉavar veñciṉac cāḷukkiyar vallavar mutalor vaṇaṅka vi
ṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 8 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭattu Ampatturnāṭṭuk kuṟaṭṭur sabhaiyom nilavilai Āvaṇaṅ kaiyyeḻuttu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār kārāṇaiviṭaṅkatevaṟku Ikkoyiliṉ Uḷḷāl Eḻu
n=taruḷi Irukkum tāṇṭeśvarar Ātecattāl tevarpaṇṭārattil tevarkanmikaḷ pakkaṟ kācu koṇṭu Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nivan=tattukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāka kākkaipaḷḷattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Ikkoṭṭattu Iṉṉāṭṭut tevatāṉam villipākkattu Ellaikku meṟkut teṉpāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyūr Ellaikku
meṟkum puliyūrkoṭṭattut tuṭarmuṉināṭṭu tiruvallivāyil Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭup piramateyam cun=tiracoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattum vāṉavaṉmātevic caruppetimaṅkalattum Ērikku nirpāyum rājarājapperuvāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭi vākkālukkut
teṟkum Iṉnāṉkellai Uḷḷum Akappaṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiyum Itaṉukku Ēriyum tulaiyum tuṭavāykaḷum nīroṭu vāykkālum maṇṇum maṇpāṭum melnokkiya maramum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭatu Oḻiviṉṟiyey viṟṟup paḻampaṭiyey kiḻ nīru pāñcu varum vāykkālum nīrum Uṭpaṭa
viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttatukku Iru kālāvatum mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Ituve vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai Āvatākavum Ipparicu Emmil Icaintu vilaipporuḷ muṟṟum Aṟakkoṇṭu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Ituve vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai Āvatākavum Ipparicu Emmil Icaintu vilaipporuḷ muṟṟum Aṟakkoṇṭu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu
kuṭuttom Iṉṉilac cuṭṭavan=ta Iṟaiyum Eccoṟuk kuṟṟunel veṭṭi Amañci nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttuk kāttūṭṭuvatākavum In=ta lakṣaṇappaṭiye tiruvoṟṟiyūrkoyilile veṭṭuvittuk koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟukkuṭuttom meṟcollappaṭṭa tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār kārāṇaiviṭaṅka tevaṟku
k kuṟaṭṭur sabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ivūrmadhyastan tevaṉ vitiviṭaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇṭittiruppokik kiramavittan Eḻuttu Ivai taviṭurt tiruveṅkaṭakkiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kiḷakkil Aṇṇimalaikkiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nelveli cakkarapāṇikkiramavittan Eḻuttu Ivai kaviḷi caṭṭikki
Ivai koṭṭur veṇṇaikkiramavittan Eḻuttu Ivai ceṭṭalūṟ kiramavittan Eḻuttu Ivai Uṟuppāṭṭiratevan Eḻuttu » Itu ceṭṭalūr tāmotiran saijñai Itu nelvelikkiramavittan Eḻuttu Ivai tivākaraṉ poṟkumārakkiramavittan Eḻuttu § Itu cerupaḷḷik kiramavittan jñai Itu vai ceruppaḷḷi muInscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 38.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
